programs.title: Food Truck Nation
programs.desc: Chef Brad Miller visits an Orange County food truck with a custom smoker on board; Brad tries classic Cajun dishes with a twist in Austin, Texas; in Los Angeles, Bard discovers an ice cream truck without a freezer.

programs.title: Food Truck Nation
programs.desc: Innovative spins on the classic grilled cheese sandwich; a veritable sushi bar on wheels with fresh tuna and wagyu beef; fresh funnel cake and ice cream to create a whole new dessert.

programs.title: Food Truck Nation
programs.desc: A food truck owned by an actual Italian prince, Prince Emanuele di Savoia; winning over locals with authentic handmade pastas, like bucatini with lemon sauce; Brad travels to Minneapolis.

programs.title: Food Truck Nation
programs.sub_title: Crepes, Indian-Spiced Meatballs and Hot Dogs
programs.desc: A husband-and-wife-owned truck in Los Angeles that is winning over Californians with crepes; a taste of Indian street food in North Carolina; a larger-than-life hot dog cart that's putting a delicious spin on the American classic.

programs.title: Food Paradise
programs.desc: A pair of period pharmacies on both coasts, a Jewish deli in Texas, a hot dog temple in Tennessee and a classic, chrome-clad diner in Minnesota; from massive old-fashioned sundaes and skyscraper sandwiches to towering patty melts and doughnuts.

programs.title: Food Paradise
programs.desc: A country-style breakfast as the sun rises over Charleston, S.C.; lunch break with Asian-inspired dishes in Chicago; limoncello cake for dessert in San Francisco; a midnight snack and a nightcap in Las Vegas.
